# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: install.istio.io/v1alpha1
kind: IstioOperator
metadata:
  name: istio-admin
spec:
  components:
    pilot:
      k8s:
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 100m
            memory: 128Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 2
            memory: 1Gi
  values:
    global:
      proxy:
        adminPort: 15000
    pilot:
      config:
        admin:
          enabled: true
    sidecarInjectorWebhook:
      injectedAnnotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/adminPort: "15000"
    meshConfig:
      proxyAdminPort: 15000
      enablePrometheusMerge: true
      defaultConfig:
        proxyAdminPort: 15000
        command:
        - istiod
        - --cert-dir=/var/run/secrets/istio
        - --key-file=/var/run/secrets/istio/key.pem
        - --ca-cert-file=/var/run/secrets/istio/cert.pem
        - --proxy-config=/etc/istio/proxy
        - --validation-port=15014
        - --monitoring-port=15014
        - --mesh-config=/etc/istio/meshconfig
        - --log-output-level=default:info
        - --log-rotate-file-size=100Mi
        - --log-rotate-max-file-number=5
        - --log-rotate-max-size=100Mi
        - --log-rotate-max-duration=30d
        - --log-rotate-max-age=30d
        - --log-rotate-max-backups=5
        - --log-rotate-max-size=100Mi
        - --log-rotate-max-age=30d
        - --log-rotate-max-backups=5
        - --log-rotate-max-size=100Mi
        - --log-rotate-max-age=30d
        - --log-rotate-max-backups=5
        - --log-rotate-max-size=100Mi
        - --log-rotate-max-age=30d
        - --log-rotate-max-backups=5
        - --log-rotate-max-size=100Mi
        - --log-rotate-max-age=30d

        - --log-rotate-max-age=30d
        - --log-rotate-max-backups=5
        - --log-rotate-max-size=100Mi
